CZH15335 is an intermediate-maturing, white-grain, high-yielding, drought-tolerant maize hybrid that is NUE and resistant to GLS, TLB, Ear rots, rust, and MSV, bred for food use in tropical, rainfed, dry/wet mid-altitude and transition ecologies in southern Africa and similar agroecologies.  
			
			General Information

			Southern...

ZM523 is an early-maturing open-pollinated maize variety (OPV) with white grain that is drought-tolerant and NUE, with resistance to GLS, MSV, and TLB, suitable for food use in tropical, rainfed, dry/wet mid-altitude and lowland ecologies in southern Africa and similar agroecologies.

CZH15001 is an early-maturing, white, high-yielding, drought-tolerant maize hybrid that is NUE and resistant to GLS, TLB and MSV, and bred for food use in tropical, rainfed, dry/wet mid-altitude and lowland ecologies in southern Africa and similar agroecologies.
			
			General Information
		
		
			
			Target region
			Southern Africa

title: CZH17200Q
descriptionTruncated:
Quality Protein Maize (QPM) is an affordable option for alleviating protein malnutrition and reducing animal feed costs. QPM looks and tastes the same as normal maize but contains higher levels of the essential amino acids lysine and tryptophan. Eating QPM is especially beneficial for children who survive on a maize-dominated diet. 
			
			General Information
		
		
			
			Adaptation/Agroecological...

descriptionFull.value:
CIMMYT's South Asia waterlogging- and drought-tolerant (SAWLDT) pipeline focuses on developing medium- to late-maturing maize hybrids with yellow grain color that are high-yielding, have good standability, tolerance to waterlogging and drought stresses, and resistance to TLB and fusarium stalk rot.       
		 
		 
			   
			   
		 
		 
			       General Information       
		 
		 
			       Adaptation/Agroecological zone       
			       Rainfed ecology of South Asia       
		 
		 
			       Hybrid Type:       
			       Single cross       
		 
		 
			   
			   
		 
		 
			       Seed Production Characteristics       
		 
		 
			       Female seed yield        
			       3.47 t/ha       
		 
		 
			       Male seed yield        
			       2.78 t/ha       
		 
		 
			       Nicking       
			       - 3.0 days       
		 
		 
			   
			   
		 
		 
			       Biotic Stress Performance       
		 
		 
			       Turcicum leaf blight (1-9)       
			       4.5       
		 
		 
			       Diseases are scored on 1-9 scale, where 1 = Highly resistant; 5 = Tolerant; 9 = Highly susceptible       
		 
		 
		 
		 
			   
			   
		 
		 
			       Abiotic Stress Performance       
		 
		 
			       Grain yield under drought stress       
			       3.2 t/ha       
		 
		 
			       Grain yield under waterlogging stress       
			       2.1 t/ha       
		 
		 
			   
			   
		 
		 
			       Agronomic Characteristics       
		 
		 
			       Maturity       
			       110 DAP       
		 
		 
			       Grain yield under optimum conditions       
			       7.5 t/ha       
		 
		 
			       Grain yield under rainfed conditions       
			       5.3 t/ha       
		 
		 
			       Grain yield under drought stress       
			       3.2 t/ha       
		 
		 
			       Grain yield under waterlogging stress       
			       2.1 t/ha       
		 
		 
			       Plant height       
			       199 cm       
		 
		 
			       Ear height       
			       93 cm       
		 
		 
			       Ear Position       
			       0.4       
		 
		 
			       Anther-silking interval       
			       1.0 days       
		 
		 
			   
			   
		 
		 
			       Further Links       
		 
		 
			        Full Announcement        
		 
		 
			        Regional Trial Data Summary        
		 
		 
			        Regional Trial Site Information        
		 
		 
			   
			   
		 
		 
			       Comments       
		 
		 
			       Product information is based on data from the CIMMYT Hyderabad Maize Regional On-Station Trials (2018) 
			 
			      Abbreviations:        
			      DAP = days after planting 
			Opt = Optimum Management 
			TLB = Turcicum Leaf Blight
